title: lagenocarpus polyphyllus
intro: Lagenocarpus polyphyllus, also known as the many-leaved spike rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lagenocarpus polyphyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lagenocarpus polyphyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
